hero.headline: Architecting the digital landscape of tomorrow.
hero.subhead: Cloud, modernization, and security work for enterprises, financial institutions, and government — delivered into production, not parked in a slide deck.

positioning.title: A turnkey software, cyber AIOps, and security partner.
positioning.body: Vergent bridges business and technology. We define what good looks like, ship it, and stay close to the work — so you don't have to translate between strategy decks and production systems.

approach.title: Embedded with your team. Accountable to outcomes.
approach.body: We don't drop binders and disappear. Vergent teams sit alongside yours — defining the work, shipping it, and owning the result through go-live and beyond.

disciplines.title: Security architecture
disciplines.summary: Designs aligned to SABSA, ITIL, and COBIT — and to the auditors you actually answer to.

disciplines.title: Architecture reviews
disciplines.summary: Enterprise security reviews and system configuration assessments against a defensible baseline.

disciplines.title: Licence rationalisation
disciplines.summary: IT licence audits that reclaim spend and surface contract risk before renewal.

disciplines.title: IT operations
disciplines.summary: Day-two consulting that keeps platforms healthy after the project closes.

disciplines.title: Project & vendor management
disciplines.summary: A single accountable owner across SIs, internal teams, and external partners.

disciplines.title: Sourcing & contracts
disciplines.summary: Supplier selection and negotiation — leverage on your side of the table.

cta.title: Have a transformation in motion or about to start?
cta.body: A short note about what you're working on goes a long way. We come back inside two business days.
cta.label: Get in touch
